             android:layout_width="fill_parent"
             android:layout_height="fill_parent" xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:xle="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto">
  <com.microsoft.xbox.toolkit.ui.SwitchPanel android:id="@id/change_friendship_switch_panel"
                        android:layout_width="fill_parent"
                        android:layout_height="fill_parent"
                        xle:selectedState="0">
    <com.microsoft.xbox.toolkit.ui.SwitchPanelItem android:layout_width="fill_parent"
                          android:layout_height="fill_parent"
                          xle:state="0">
      <ScrollView android:layout_width="fill_parent"
                  android:layout_height="fill_parent">
        <LinearLayout android:orientation="vertical"
                      android:layout_width="fill_parent"
                      android:layout_height="wrap_content">
          <RelativeLayout android:paddingLeft="20.0dp"
                          android:layout_width="fill_parent"
                          android:layout_height="80.0dp">
            <com.microsoft.xbox.toolkit.ui.XLERoundedUniversalImageView android:id="@id/change_friendship_profile_pic"
                                  android:layout_width="60.0dp"
                                  android:layout_height="60.0dp"
                                  android:src="@drawable/gamerpic_missing"
                                  android:layout_centerVertical="true" />
            <com.microsoft.xbox.toolkit.ui.CustomTypefaceTextView android:textSize="11.0sp"
                                  android:textColor="@color/textSoftWhite"
                                  android:id="@id/people_favorites_icon"
                                  android:visibility="gone"
                                  android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                                  android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                                  android:layout_marginRight="12.0dp"
                                  android:layout_marginBottom="12.0dp"
                                  android:text="@string/ic_Favorite"
                                  android:layout_alignLeft="@id/change_friendship_profile_pic"
                                  android:layout_alignTop="@id/change_friendship_profile_pic"
                                  style="@style/xbox_symbol" />
            <include layout="@layout/change_friendship_dialog_header" />
          </RelativeLayout>
          <LinearLayout android:orientation="vertical"
                        android:layout_width="fill_parent"
                        android:layout_height="0.0dp"
                        android:layout_marginLeft="15.0dp"
                        android:layout_marginTop="10.0dp"
                        android:layout_marginRight="15.0dp"
                        android:layout_weight="1.0">
            <RadioGroup android:orientation="vertical"
                        android:id="@id/settings_share_real_name"
                        android:layout_width="fill_parent"
                        android:layout_height="wrap_content">
              <RadioButton android:id="@id/add_as_friend"
                           android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                           android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                           android:button="@drawable/apptheme_btn_radio_holo_light"
                           android:text="@string/ChangeRelationship_Label_Friend"
                           style="@style/RadioButtonText" />
              <com.microsoft.xbox.toolkit.ui.CustomTypefaceTextView android:layout_width="fill_parent"
                                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                                    android:layout_marginLeft="35.0dp"
                                    android:text="@string/ChangeRelationship_RadioButton_Subtext_Friend"
                                    style="@style/ButtonSubText_grey" />
              <RadioButton android:id="@id/add_as_favorite"
                           android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                           android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                           android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/settingsScreenPropertySeparator"
                           android:button="@drawable/apptheme_btn_radio_holo_light"
                           android:text="@string/ChangeRelationship_Label_Favorite"
                           style="@style/RadioButtonText" />
              <com.microsoft.xbox.toolkit.ui.CustomTypefaceTextView android:layout_width="fill_parent"
                                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                                    android:layout_marginLeft="35.0dp"
                                    android:text="@string/ChangeRelationship_RadioButton_Subtext_Favorite"
                                    style="@style/ButtonSubText_grey" />
            </RadioGroup>
            <com.microsoft.xbox.toolkit.ui.XLECheckBox android:id="@id/share_real_name_checkbox"
                                  android:layout_width="fill_parent"
                                  android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                                  android:layout_marginTop="30.0dp"
                                  xle:subText="@string/ChangeRelationship_Checkbox_Subtext_ShareRealName_Everyone"
                                  xle:subTextStyle="@style/ButtonSubText_grey"
                                  xle:subTextTypefaceSource="fonts/SegoeWP.ttf"
                                  xle:text="@string/RealNameSharing_Share"
                                  xle:textStyle="@style/settings_checkbox_text"
                                  xle:textTypefaceSource="fonts/SegoeWP-Semibold.ttf" />
            <include android:id="@id/remove_friend_btn_layout"
                     android:visibility="gone"
                     android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                     android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                     android:layout_marginLeft="5.0dp"
                     android:layout_marginTop="10.0dp"
                     layout="@layout/change_friendship_remove_button" />
            <LinearLayout android:layout_width="fill_parent"
                          android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                          android:weightSum="2.0"
                          android:layout_alignParentBottom="true">
              <com.microsoft.xbox.toolkit.ui.XLEButton android:gravity="center"
                                    android:id="@id/cancel_button"
                                    android:layout_width="0.0dp"
                                    android:layout_height="40.0dp"
                                    android:layout_marginRight="5.0dp"
                                    android:text="@string/MessageDialog_Cancel"
                                    android:layout_weight="1.0"
                                    style="@style/friendfinder_button" />
              <com.microsoft.xbox.toolkit.ui.XLEButton android:gravity="center"
                                    android:orientation="horizontal"
                                    android:id="@id/submit_button"
                                    android:layout_width="0.0dp"
                                    android:layout_height="40.0dp"
                                    android:text="@string/OK_Text"
                                    android:layout_weight="1.0"
                                    style="@style/friendfinder_button" />
            </LinearLayout>
          </LinearLayout>
        </LinearLayout>
      </ScrollView>
      <com.microsoft.xbox.toolkit.ui.FastProgressBar android:layout_gravity="center"
                            android:id="@id/overlay_loading_indicator"
                            android:visibility="gone"
                            android:layout_width="64.0dp"
                            android:layout_height="64.0dp"
                            android:indeterminateOnly="true"
                            android:indeterminateDrawable="@drawable/rotate_loading_rings_small" />
    </com.microsoft.xbox.toolkit.ui.SwitchPanelItem>
    <com.microsoft.xbox.toolkit.ui.SwitchPanelItem android:layout_gravity="center"
                          android:layout_width="fill_parent"
                          android:layout_height="fill_parent"
                          xle:state="1">
      <com.microsoft.xbox.toolkit.ui.FastProgressBar android:layout_gravity="center"
                            android:id="@id/imageviewer_loading"
                            android:layout_width="64.0dp"
                            android:layout_height="64.0dp"
                            android:indeterminateOnly="true" />
    </com.microsoft.xbox.toolkit.ui.SwitchPanelItem>
  </com.microsoft.xbox.toolkit.ui.SwitchPanel>
</FrameLayout>
